header.title: Custom software and SaaS-style products for real operations
header.subtitle: We run our own products in production, not just client projects. That means we've fixed our own broken billing flow, our own permission bugs, our own 2am uptime alerts, before we ever touched yours.

items.title: SaaS & customer-facing products
items.text: Subscription apps and multi-tenant systems, with auth, roles, and billing built to hold up at scale.

items.title: Business platforms
items.text: Internal tools built around how approvals actually happen: who signs off, who's notified, who's blocked.

items.title: Dashboards & data tools
items.text: One live view of the business, so no one's asking the WhatsApp group for last week's numbers.

items.title: Integrations & automation
items.text: Stripe, Slack, WhatsApp, your CRM, wired together so nothing breaks quietly at midnight.
